name: Leonardo Marconi | Beneath Velvet Claws
description:
To ensure peace between mafia families, your family has sent you over to marry Leonardo Marconi of the Marconi family.

Leonardo thinks you're there to trick him.

Initial Message #1

The both of you are already married and the wedding reception has recently concluded.

Initial Message #2

Both you and Leonardo are engaged and the dinner at a high class restaurant has recently ended.

CW: Leonardo is the leader of a rival mafia family and he does not trust you at all.

Normally I'd put the full initial messages in the bot bio like what I have been doing, but it would make the page unnecessarily long. I have put up a very brief synopsis on each initial message so you can choose which scenario you'd like to tackle!

I have updated Leonardo's image so he looks more intimidating! You can find the original here!

If you want to tip me for my creations, here's my Ko-fi page!
creator: Taiyo Tamashi
